text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns dark out before we know it as we train for
the Satsuki Sho. And then...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, it's Ryan! Hello, hello!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ines...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We unexpectedly come across her roommate, and
rival, Ines Fujin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Are you done for the day, Ines? Heading back to
the dorm already?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I have a meeting with my trainer after this, so we
may not be able to have dinner together.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! Well then, guess I'll be dining alone
tonight.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to wait till tomorrow to do our
pre-bed stretches too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They share a room and are both into working out,
so it sounds like they have a daily routine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ines... You surprised me. I didn't expect you to
take the initiative like this.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, my breakaway speed is what I'm known
for. ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But it does make sense that you didn't expect it.
We never really talk about stuff like that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I don't like to bring the competition into
our room.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And I have my own goals, of course. It'd be pretty
boring if I was always just your buddy sidekick.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Also... I'm a little jealous.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Because all Ryan ever talks about is
McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm your friend, but I'm also your rival. So I hope I
can become interesting enough for you to see me
more as a racer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What? You're interesting, Ines! Really, I promise!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah? If so, then you won't just ignore me
when I take the lead at the Satsuki Sho, will you?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna break away as fast as I can, so I hope
you come and tackle me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: What? ...I don't think that'll work in a race.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I was just kidding. But really, I want you to
come at me like you're trying to.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm heading back. I'll leave the door
unlocked for ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin leaves with a bounce in her step as she
goes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: A race against Ines, huh? And at the Classics...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
She's always been by my side. We've shared so
many happy moments together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the Twinkle Series is really something,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
When I think of how I'll be competing against my
own roommate, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's not that... But it does feel a little strange.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This is really what life at the academy is. I've
never realized it until now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When friends have to compete against each
other, immeasurable levels of both happiness and
sadness inevitably lie ahead...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan gazes at the track as the lights dim.
The finish line in the distance is no longer visible.
